message:
You know that one friend who panics at the mention of a storm? Yep, I have one too! Last winter, as the weather reports started ramping up about a big snowstorm, she was texting me every hour asking if I had enough milk and bread (you know, the essentials!). I couldn’t help but chuckle because I had prepared ahead and was cozy with my hot cocoa, but her worry really got me thinking. 

In the end, I gently reminded her that a little prep goes a long way in easing those nerves. I shared some tips on what to do before a storm hits, and we had a great chat about it! 

Sometimes, it just takes a calm friend to help balance out the panic. Have you ever been the calm one in a stormy situation?
